title: Evaluate Redis vs. NATS vs. Kafka for Real-Time
description: Evaluate Redis, NATS, and Kafka based on latency requirements, persistence needs, and fan-out scale. Choose the appropriate messaging backbone for specific real-time system requirements.
objectives: Evaluate Redis, NATS, and Kafka based on latency requirements, persistence needs, and fan-out scale.
Choose the appropriate messaging backbone for specific real-time system requirements.
